name: Cleartext Storage of Sensitive Information
description: The product stores sensitive information such as passwords, tokens, or personal data in cleartext within a resource that could be accessible to unauthorized actors, including files, databases, cookies, memory, or environment variables.
detection_pattern: Sensitive data (credentials, PII, tokens) flows from a TRANSFORM or INGRESS node to a STORAGE node (file, database, cookie, registry, environment variable) without passing through a TRANSFORM[encryption] node that encrypts or hashes the data before storage
